about_the_product.description: The Intel Core i3-12100F 64-bit processor is a powerful and efficient choice for your desktop. With a clock speed of 3.30 GHz and quad-core processing it delivers fast and responsive performance for all your computing needs. The 12 MB L3 cache ensures quick access to data while the socket LGA-1700 makes installation a breeze. This processor supports 64-bit processing allowing you to take advantage of the latest software and applications. With an overclocking speed of up to 4.30 GHz you can push the limits of performance even further. The 12th Gen processor generation brings you the latest technology for improved efficiency and productivity. With a thermal specification of 212°F 100°C you can rely on this processor to stay cool under pressure. Its compact design with a depth and width of 1.8" makes it easy to fit into any desktop setup. Upgrade your computing experience with the Intel Core i3-12100F 64-bit processor.

changing the cooler (Noctua U9S). It runs very cool and quiet, supporting my 3060 Ti perfectly. I cant think of any better value for mainstream gaming usage.
This CPU has excellent performance. Everything loads extremely quickly. So far it can handle games that my prior FX-8120 would struggle with and is very capable
Need a video card and then you're in business! So far so good, happy with graphics and speed... yes get it!

user_reviews.text: Coming from a 4th gen Intel, this upgrade has made me realise what I had been missing out on for so long! I am so impressed with its ability to keep up with everything I throw at it, and while I'm no big gamer, I appreciate the speeds and the energy savings from this CPU. I find the i3 most adequate for my photo/video editing, internet browsing and gaming every now and then. Paired with a brand new motherboard, I am now fully reaping the benefits of my graphics card, DDR4 RAM, along with the lasting support of the latest PCIe revisions etc. I'm comfortable knowing that this CPU will last me for a good while before I need to consider buying even more powerful processors from Intel in the future.

Pros:
-Really great single core IPC performance
-Cheap and outperforms old-generation Ryzens easily
-FREE RM1 cooler looks mean
-Runs cool on my tests even with stock cooler

Cons:
-Doesn't have iGPU
-Suffers from the dreaded 'i3 branding'
-Poor resale value because most 'normies' will see i3 and dismiss it
-You can't remove the i3 branding
-Your self-esteem stats will decrease because of i3 branding
-Box comes with same colour scheme as 11th gen, so you will really struggle convincing people about that this is 12th gen CPU
-Don't know why they made i3 font bigger over 12th Gen
-Your mates will judge you because you have an i3, even though they have 2nd/3rd gen i7's (which are waay slower)

TLDR - it's good, like really good... just be sure to find an i7 sticker and slap it on your PC.

Performance:Overall good product and working great.

Delivery is fast from both seller & courier. However, got a small issue with the stock fan. One of the legs was bent a bit. Had to readjust and took about 1 hour just to install the fan. I don't think this is an issue from the seller, and suspect it was a manufacturing defect.

Performance:Powerful Enough For Gaming

Very fast shipping by seller. The product quality is superb. 100% new, no dent or scratch. Item perform super great and powerful enough to play latest games, rendering videos and editing. I have under estimated i3 performance before but no doubt now. Ty seller. 🫰
